name: CH422G I/O Expander
description: The CH422G component allows you to use the **CH422G** I/O expander in ESPHome. It uses an [I²C Bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) for communication. The I²C address is not configurable as the CH422G has a separate address for each internal register.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this `ch422g` component.
